prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为约5066名（2021理科）→8527名（2022理科）→8226名（2023理科）→26768名（2024理科，含本科一批B段拉低）→10580名（2025物理类），整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次约10580名；本省理科组计划2021年4人→2022年4人→2023年10人→2024年20人→2025年26人（物理类），持续扩招；2026年计划17人，较2025年缩招约34.6%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第46→2022年第50→2023年第47→2024年第58→2025年第56→2026年第53，近年稳定在50名左右，属中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏正面（81岁博士毕业事件引发正面关注）；抖音热度排名第89、评价一般，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；教育学A+（全国顶尖），中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，共5个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，心理学类（A-）热度偏热；本省2026年普通高考总人数约15.4万，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增长约32.3%，物理类考生估算约11.08万，竞争加剧；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，在内蒙古招生占比约1.5%–2.5%，属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10580名、2026年计划缩招34.6%（使位次数字减小）、本省物理类考生大增约32.3%（使位次数字增大），两者对冲后竞争仍略加剧；声誉偏正面、专业热度较高对位次有上移压力。预测最低位次约8882名，区间8382–9382名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（8382–9382名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲心理学类（A-学科）和计算机类（高热推荐）；位次接近区间上限建议以公共管理类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 5066 (2021 science) → 8527 (2022 science) → 8226 (2023 science) → 26768 (2024 science, including undergraduate batch B segment lowering) → 10580 (2025 physics category), showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall, with a baseline ranking of about 10580 in 2025; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 4 in 2021 → 4 in 2022 → 10 in 2023 → 20 in 2024 → 26 in 2025 (physics category), with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 17, a reduction of about 34.6% compared to 2025, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking was 46th in 2021 → 50th in 2022 → 47th in 2023 → 58th in 2024 → 56th in 2025 → 53rd in 2026, stable around 50th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive (the incident of an 81-year-old doctoral graduate sparked positive attention); Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with average evaluation and medium short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, with a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong strength in normal disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended with high social popularity; Psychology (A-) is relatively popular; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), with an estimated 110,800 physics category candidates, intensifying competition; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with an enrollment share of about 1.5%–2.5% in Inner Mongolia, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10580, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 34.6% (which decreases the ranking number), and the significant increase of about 32.3% in provincial physics category candidates (which increases the ranking number), the two factors offset each other but competition still slightly intensifies; the somewhat positive reputation and high major popularity exert upward pressure on rankings. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8882, with a range of 8382–9382.

- Computer (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information
- Chemistry (including Chemistry (Elite Class), Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry), etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences
- Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (8382–9382), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Psychology (A- discipline) and Computer (highly recommended); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to use Public Administration as a safety.

学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, and among the top nationally in normal universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive (the 81-year-old doctoral graduation incident sparked positive attention for lifelong learning); Douyin popularity ranking: 89th, with average reviews; no records of enrollment gaps; Education A+ (top nationally), Political Science A-, Chinese History A-, Marxist Theory A-, with strong liberal arts disciplines, and Political Science directly corresponds to the enrollment major.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1530, a slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan by 9.1% (causing a slight decrease in ranking number), and a significant increase in history category examinees by about 32.3% (causing a notable increase in ranking number), the increase in examinees far outweighs the enrollment reduction effect, intensifying competition; the reputation is generally positive, exerting upward pressure.
